edus.text: BEIJING-In a phone call with President Donald Trump , Chinese President Xi Jinping urged restraint
in dealing with North Korea ,
hours after the American leader said
military resources were in place ,
" locked and loaded ,
should Pyongyang " act unwisely . "
Both sides emphasized different takeaways from the call ,
which was expected to occur .
According to a statement
issued by the White House early Saturday ,
" the leaders affirmed
that the recent adoption of a new United Nations Security Council resolution on North Korea was an important and necessary step
toward achieving peace and stability on the Korean Peninsula . "
" President Trump and President Xi agreed
North Korea must stop its provocative and escalatory behavior , "
the White House statement said .
According to an account of the call
published by state broadcaster China Central Television ,
Mr. Xi said
all sides should " avoid words and deeds
that increase tensions on the Korean Peninsula . "
Mr. Xi told Mr. Trump
that dialogue remains the best way
to resolve the North Korean nuclear problem ,
and that China is willing to work with the U.S.
to push for an " appropriate solution , "
according to CCTV .
Mr. Trump told Mr. Xi
that he " completely understands the role
China has played
in dealing with the North Korean nuclear problem , "
according to the CCTV account .
Mr. Trump also said
relations between the U.S. and China are developing in a positive direction ,
the broadcaster said .
Foreign leaders from around the world have called on Washington and Pyongyang to end a cycle of rhetorical threats
that have raised the specter of nuclear war .
French President Emmanuel Macron spoke by phone Saturday with Mr. Trump about the crisis in North Korea , " with the objective
of avoiding all escalation , "
an official from Mr. Macron ' s office said Saturday ,
adding
that the two leaders agreed to stay in touch in coming days .
Earlier Saturday , the French president ' s office issued a statement
decrying a " dangerous escalation " on the part of the regime in Pyongyang
and calling on the international community to " ensure that North Korea returns without conditions to the path of dialogue . "
The White House later issued a statement
saying
Messrs. Trump and Macron " pledged to work together with allies and partners
to enforce United Nations sanctions
and achieve denuclearization of the Korean Peninsula. "
It noted
that the U.S " is ready , along with its allies , to apply the full range of diplomatic , economic , and military measures
to achieve that goal . "
